# LyricsFluencer App

## What is the goal of the app?
Learning a language through music lyrics 

With this app you can understand lyrics in an other language and learn the language by adding words to your flashcard deck. You are able to recognize songs with Shazam and can google the meaning of words you don't know.

## What are the containing Files?

* LyricsFluencer-SwiftUI - The App source code
* LyricsFluencer-BackEnd - The NextJS/Express BackEnd 
* LyricsFluencer-BackEndLite - A Express Backend with static HTML exported files generated by the NextJS Backend

6. Learn added cards

 You can start using the App after joining the newsletter at the <a href="www.lyricsfluencer.com">LyricsFluencer Website</a>.
